get.summary: Search Projects using the provided input string

400.description: Bad request: The format of the request is not correct

parameters.name: searchStr
parameters.description: Search Criteria; more than 2 characters required.

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: The number of objects to return; default 50; max 1000

parameters.name: $skip
parameters.description: The number of objects to skip in case of paginating through the serach results; default 0

get.description: project export status (Long running task), this should be called after calling start project export API

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: URI of a lrt task obtained from start project export api

post.description: start project import (Long running task), use the dslrtId of the response of this api to call get project import status api. Please refer to Import Schema to check the valid fields and values allowed to import project json attached below.

relativePath.description: The relative path to the task

examples: task of autonomous cars of the company

name.description: unique object Id of the task

percentComplete.description: The percentage of the task completion

estimatedStartDate.description: planned start date of the task

estimatedEndDate.description: planned end date of the task

actualStartDate.description: actual start date of the task

actualEndDate.description: actual end date of the task

userDefinedStart.description: Start date fixed of the task

userDefinedEnd.description: End date fixed of the task

durationIntervalMin.description: calculated as (duration - offset). It represents the shortest possible duration, which is the midpoint duration reduced by the offset

durationIntervalMax.description: calculated as (duration + offset). It represents the longest possible duration, which is the midpoint duration increased by the offset

actualEffort.description: Actual effort spent on the task. Can only be set when task maturity is InProgress or Done

owner.description: URI (iam:testUser or uuid v4) of owner of task

service.description: The type of the bookmark object

hasWorkContext.description: list of contributesTo objects in case of Story Task only

identifier.description: The URI of the object attched as contributesTo

relativePath.description: The relative path to the parent

accountName.description: login Id or accountname of the assignee

identifier.description: URI of person(iam:testUser or uuid v4)

relativePath.description: The relative path to the person.
relative path does not exists
